title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 267.677 - Identification marks on dipped sheep and goats
text:
267.677.  Identification marks on dipped sheep and goats. — All sheep and goats so dipped shall be identified or marked in a manner approved by the department and shall be accompanied by a certificate showing that the sheep or goats were dipped under supervision.
(L. 1961 p. 26 § 3)
